profile.evidence: Achha, matlab koi fix nahi hai sir, matlab ki ye keh rahe ho sir aap? So aap ITR wagera file karte ho sir abhi aap government ko? Nahi.
profile.summary: Agent pitched a Tata AIA combined plan and completed discovery, but the call ended after the agent acknowledged the customer's variable income and lack of ITR filing.

occupation.evidence: Mera matlab ki theke pe kaam hai sir. Bas, sales and marketing ka kaam hai, jaise hum market se maal uthaye aur market mein bech diye.

income_band_inr.evidence: kabhi 80 ho jata hai, kabhi 70 ho jata hai, kabhi 1 lakh bhi pahunch jata hai.

compliance.return_claim_quote: jo premium aap pay kar rahe ho na apne term coverage ke liye sir, wo amount sir aapka yahan par ye refundable rahega
